name: Prime Arena
short_description: Prime Arena is a combination of MOBA and survival gameplay inspired by PUBG. This dynamic deathmatch arena is free of forced socialization and thus of toxic atmosphere found in MOBAs. Victory fully depends on players skill and reaction speed no teammates, no cry!
detailed_description:
FREE DEMO AVAILABLE!


Prime Arena Founders Pack

Unlock All Current and Future Prime Arena Heroes!
Buying this pack you will get the infinite access to all existing and upcoming heroes immediately and the remarkable rewards in the nearest future.

What you will get immediately:


Don't wait for your favorite hero in the rotation!
Play all heroes with no restrictions. You’ll get all current Heroes and future too.

What you will get in the nearest future:


Like chatting with other players? Stand out among them!
Use exclusive emoticons to express your emotions.

Make your mark in Prime Arena! Support the project now, and all other players will see your name in the game credits. That's our way of saying many thanks to you.

It's always pleasant to stand out among other players! Emphasize your special status with an in-game portrait. You will be hard to miss.

Sow fear among opponents on the map! Lift up in place of the defeated enemies a special banner. Let everyone see your power!


About the Game

Prime Arena is a combination of MOBA and survival gameplay inspired by PUBG.
This dynamic deathmatch arena is free of forced socialization and thus of toxic atmosphere found in MOBAs.
Victory fully depends on player’s skill and reaction speed — no teammates, no cry!
The game currently is in Coming Soon status on Steam. Developers follow players` feedback and ideas constantly to implement the best of them in the game


Play MOBA with PUBG inspired survival ambiance.
Choose your favorite character and defeat other players on the map.
Survive them all!


Play without clumsy companions in your team.
Just you, your mad skills, and a thirst for victory!
No teammates, no cry.


Play hard, run fast, hit often.
No more typical long-time MOBA game sessions.
Dynamic gameplay and possibility to join next session at the first onset.
